# terrible_community_general_packet_volume (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `project_id` (String) ID of project of the device.

### Optional

- `auth_token` (String) Packet API token. You can also supply it in environment variable `PACKET_API_TOKEN`.
- `billing_cycle` (String) Billing cycle for new volume.
- `description` (String) User-defined description attribute for Packet volume. It is used used as idempotent identifier - if volume with given description exists, new one is not created.
- `facility` (String) Location of the volume. Volumes can only be attached to device in the same location.
- `id` (String) UUID of a volume.
- `locked` (Boolean) Create new volume locked.
- `name` (String) Selector for API-generated name of the volume.
- `plan` (String) `storage_1` for standard tier, `storage_2` for premium (performance) tier. Tiers are described at https://www.packet.com/cloud/storage/.
- `size` (Number) Size of the volume in gigabytes.
- `snapshot_policy` (String) Snapshot policy for new volume.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the volume.
